Operation 'listHabits' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks details about the response format (list of habit objects) and explicitly stating authentication requirement. Enhanced description clarifies return type and authentication context for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Get all habits of the authenticated user.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all habits for the authenticated user. Returns a list of habit objects containing habit details. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks details about the response format (list of habit objects) and explicitly stating authentication requirement. Enhanced description clarifies return type and authentication context for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'createDate' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and domain-appropriate. data.current_description: Create a completed date entry for a habit.
data.description_suggestion: Record a habit completion for a specific date. Accepts habit ID and date in the request body. Returns the created date entry object. Requires bearer token authentication. This marks the habit as completed on the specified date and contributes to the habit's completion streak.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and domain-appropriate. data.current_description: Get the last completed dates of a habit.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the most recent completed date entries for a specific habit. Requires habit ID as a query parameter. Returns a list of date entry objects ordered by date in descending order. Requires bearer token authentication. Useful for viewing recent habit completion history and tracking streaks.
